headline: T. Rowe Price April AUM Rises 6.7% Sequentially Despite Net Outflows
summary: TROW's April AUM climbed 6.7% to $1.83T as gains in equity and multi-asset products offset $10.6B in net outflows.

raw.headline: T. Rowe Price April AUM Rises 6.7% Sequentially Despite Net Outflows

headline: Invesco Ltd. to Participate in Bernstein's Annual Strategic Decisions Conference
summary: Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ), a leading global asset management firm announced today that Andrew Schlossberg, President and Chief Executive Officer will participate in a fireside chat at Bernstein's Annual Strategic Decisions Conference at 2:30 p.m. ET Wednesday, May 27, 2026.

headline: Assessing Invesco (IVZ) Valuation After A Strong 1 Month Share Price Rally
summary: Valuation snapshot after recent share price move With Invesco (IVZ) recently closing at $28.38, investors may be reassessing the stock after a strong month, a total return of 20.36%, and a past 3 months gain of 7.34%. That share price sits alongside a reported annual revenue of $6,592.4m and a net income loss of $667.0m, providing a starting point to weigh the current valuation and recent performance together.
